_doc: IP/IV regression test cases. IP cases test prompt validation, IV cases test image metadata validation. type: true_positive = should detect, false_positive = should NOT detect.

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — Korean text in prompt blocks generation
cases.description: Prompt contains Korean text — Gemini will render broken Korean glyphs

input.prompt: 물류 창고 내부 사진, 컨베이어 벨트가 보이는 장면

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — tier >= 3 triggers HTML chart recommendation
cases.description: Tier 3 images are complex charts — should recommend HTML chart instead

input.prompt: Complex multi-layered data visualization with comparison matrix

cases.source: synthetic — tier 4 should also trigger
cases.description: Tier 4 (if ever used) should also warn

input.prompt: Detailed process flow with multiple interconnected stages

cases.source: synthetic — tier 2 should not trigger
cases.description: Tier 2 is standard — no warning needed

input.prompt: Abstract gradient illustration of cloud computing concept

cases.source: synthetic — tier 1 should not trigger
cases.description: Tier 1 is simple — no warning needed

input.prompt: Soft blue background texture with subtle noise

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — 1:1 without icon keyword is suspicious
cases.description: 1:1 ratio is intended for icons — prompt without 'icon' likely misuses the ratio

input.prompt: Abstract geometric pattern with blue gradient

cases.source: synthetic — 1:1 with unrelated description
cases.description: 1:1 landscape photo is definitely a mismatch

input.prompt: Panoramic mountain vista with morning fog

cases.source: synthetic — 1:1 with icon keyword is correct usage
cases.description: 1:1 ratio with icon keyword — expected usage

input.prompt: Flat design icon representing cloud computing, minimal style

cases.source: synthetic — non-1:1 ratio should never trigger IP-03
cases.description: 16:9 ratio without icon keyword — IP-03 only checks 1:1

input.prompt: Abstract geometric pattern with blue gradient

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — numeric data triggers fake infographic
cases.description: Prompt contains percentage — Gemini will generate fake data chart

input.prompt: Bar chart showing 45% increase in revenue, pie chart with $1.2M label

cases.source: synthetic — aspect ratio hint contains numbers but not data
cases.description: Numbers in aspect ratio hints like [3:4] should not trigger IP-04

input.prompt: Aerial view of logistics hub at night, dramatic lighting [3:4]

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — text rendering keywords
cases.description: Prompt requests text rendering — Gemini will render broken text

input.prompt: Infographic with caption: 'Total Revenue Growth' and labeled axes

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — prompt < 20 chars too short
cases.description: Very short prompt produces low-quality or random output

input.prompt: blue background

cases.source: synthetic — exactly 19 chars (boundary)
cases.description: Boundary case: 19 chars is under 20 threshold

input.prompt: abstract blue waves

cases.source: synthetic — exactly 20 chars should not trigger
cases.description: Boundary case: exactly 20 chars meets minimum

input.prompt: abstract blue waves!

cases.source: synthetic — long prompt should not trigger
cases.description: Normal length prompt with adequate detail

input.prompt: Abstract geometric illustration of modern cloud computing infrastructure with blue gradient tones

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — quoted text becomes literal rendering
cases.description: Quoted phrases cause Gemini to render literal text in image

input.prompt: Abstract design with the text "Revenue Growth" prominently displayed

cases.source: R56-R60 testing — long but effective prompts should only WARN, not block
cases.description: Prompt over 600 chars gets WARN (not ERROR) — generation continues

input.prompt: A very detailed abstract vector graphic illustration showing a modern logistics warehouse interior with conveyor belts and automated sorting systems, muted desaturated tones, soft diffused lighting, geometric shapes representing packages flowing through the system, no text no labels no annotations, main element offset left, clean minimal composition with plenty of negative space, corporate professional feel with navy and orange accent colors, suitable for business presentation background, abstract and non-literal interpretation preferred over photorealistic rendering

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — portrait ratio with wide-angle keyword
cases.description: Portrait 3:4 ratio contradicts wide-angle keyword — mismatch

input.prompt: Panoramic wide-angle cityscape at sunset with golden light

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — portrait ratio with ultrawide keyword
cases.description: Portrait 9:16 ratio contradicts ultrawide keyword

input.prompt: Ultrawide cinematic landscape of desert dunes at dawn

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — landscape ratio with tall/towering keyword
cases.description: Landscape 16:9 with tall keyword — vertical subject in horizontal frame

input.prompt: Tall towering skyscraper reaching into clouds, dramatic perspective

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — landscape ratio with portrait keyword
cases.description: Landscape 3:2 with portrait keyword — mismatch

input.prompt: Portrait orientation photograph of a lighthouse

cases.source: generate-images.mjs B2 — 'vertical bar chart' describes bar direction, not image orientation
cases.description: Vertical bar chart in landscape frame is correct — 'vertical' modifies 'bar', not image

input.prompt: Abstract vertical bar chart with ascending gradient bars

cases.source: synthetic — landscape ratio with no conflicting keywords
cases.description: Normal landscape prompt with no vertical keywords — no mismatch

input.prompt: Soft gradient abstract background with geometric elements

cases.source: synthetic — portrait ratio with no wide-angle keywords
cases.description: Normal portrait prompt — no wide-angle keywords, no mismatch

input.prompt: Abstract vertical composition of flowing waterfall, misty atmosphere

cases.source: generate-images.mjs B2 — 'vertical column' describes chart type, not image orientation
cases.description: Vertical column chart in 21:9 landscape is correct

input.prompt: Minimalist vertical column chart showing quarterly progress

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — tier mismatch >= 2 between specified and estimated
cases.description: Tier 1 specified but prompt has many concept keywords — estimated tier 3

input.prompt: Complex chart showing process flow with graph data and comparison matrix versus table statistics in pipeline workflow timeline stages

cases.source: synthetic — tier matches estimation
cases.description: Tier 1 with simple prompt — estimated tier 1, no mismatch

input.prompt: Soft blue gradient background with subtle noise texture

cases.source: synthetic — off by only 1 tier should not trigger (threshold is >= 2)
cases.description: Tier 2 specified, estimated 1 — difference is only 1, no warning

input.prompt: Abstract illustration of a modern cityscape

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — inherent text subject: compass
cases.description: Compass has inherent N/S/E/W labels — VQA text_absence will be low

input.prompt: Detailed compass showing cardinal directions with golden frame

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — inherent text subject: calculator
cases.description: Calculator inherently shows numbers on buttons and display

input.prompt: Retro calculator with large buttons in pastel colors

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — inherent text subject: keyboard
cases.description: Keyboard has letters on every key

input.prompt: Mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting, macro shot

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — inherent text subject: clock
cases.description: Clock face has numbers

input.prompt: Vintage wall clock with roman numerals and brass frame

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — inherent text subject: dashboard
cases.description: Dashboard has labels and readouts

input.prompt: Modern car dashboard with glowing instruments at night

cases.source: synthetic — generic subject without inherent text
cases.description: Mountain landscape has no inherent text elements

input.prompt: Majestic mountain landscape at sunrise with morning fog

cases.source: synthetic — abstract concept without inherent text
cases.description: Abstract flowing shapes have no text

input.prompt: Abstract flowing liquid metal shapes in silver and blue tones

cases.source: R56-R60 testing — staircase element count unreliable
cases.description: Staircase keyword triggers WARN — Gemini consistently miscounts elements

input.prompt: Four-step staircase diagram with ascending bars showing growth progression

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — warm keywords with cool-dominant palette
cases.description: Warm keywords (sunset, golden) conflict with blue-dominant palette

input.prompt: Warm golden sunset amber landscape with fire-like glow and autumn leaves

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — cool keywords with warm-dominant palette
cases.description: Cool keywords (icy, frozen, arctic) conflict with red/orange palette

input.prompt: Icy frozen arctic winter landscape with frost crystals

cases.source: synthetic — warm keywords with warm-matching palette (no conflict)
cases.description: Warm keywords with warm palette — colors match, no conflict

input.prompt: Warm golden sunset amber glow over desert dunes

cases.source: synthetic — only 1 warm keyword (need >= 2 to trigger)
cases.description: Single warm keyword with cool palette — under threshold of 2 warm matches

input.prompt: Sunset landscape with rolling hills and misty valleys

cases.source: synthetic — no palette colors provided
cases.description: Warm keywords but no palette colors — cannot check conflict

input.prompt: Warm golden sunset amber landscape with fire glow

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — requires VQA keyword DB for testing
cases.description: Prompt with zero recommended keywords — requires keyword DB which is not available in regression runner

input.prompt: Generic abstract design without any quality keywords from the database

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — requires VQA keyword DB for testing
cases.description: Prompt with 2-4 recommended keywords — requires keyword DB which is not available in regression runner

input.prompt: Minimalist flat design icon with soft gradient and clean lines

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — 3+ hex colors Gemini ignores
cases.description: 3 hex color codes in prompt — Gemini cannot match specific hex tones

input.prompt: Abstract gradient background using #1A2B3C, #4D5E6F, and #7A8B9C color scheme

cases.source: synthetic — 5 hex colors well above threshold
cases.description: 5 hex codes is excessive — Gemini will ignore most

input.prompt: Corporate palette #FF5733 primary, #C70039 accent, #900C3F secondary, #581845 dark, #FFC300 highlight on geometric shapes

cases.source: synthetic — 2 hex colors is under threshold
cases.description: Only 2 hex codes — under the >= 3 threshold

input.prompt: Gradient background from #1A2B3C to #4D5E6F with soft transition

cases.source: synthetic — no hex colors at all
cases.description: Natural color names instead of hex codes — preferred approach

input.prompt: Gradient background from navy blue to steel gray with soft transition

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — safety filter blocked
cases.description: Gemini safety filter blocked the generation — must retry with different prompt

cases.source: synthetic — normal completion should not trigger
cases.description: Normal STOP finish reason — not blocked

cases.source: synthetic — null finish reason should not trigger
cases.description: Missing finishReason is not a safety block

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — very dark image unusable as non-cover
cases.description: Non-cover image with avg brightness < 30 is too dark for text readability

input.prompt: Abstract geometric shapes in soft pastel tones

cases.source: synthetic — dark cover slide is intentional
cases.description: Dark image with 'cover' in slide title — intentionally dark for cover design

input.prompt: Abstract dark design

cases.source: synthetic — night scene is intentionally dark
cases.description: Night scene in slide title — dark is expected

input.slideTitle: City at night with neon lights
input.prompt: Neon cityscape

cases.source: synthetic — brightness >= 30 should not trigger
cases.description: Brightness at exactly 30 — at boundary, should not trigger

input.prompt: Dim atmospheric illustration

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — near-white image is unusable
cases.description: Image with avg brightness > 240 for regular photo — near white

input.prompt: Colorful abstract illustration

cases.source: synthetic — icon type with brightness > 252
cases.description: Icon type gets relaxed threshold (252) but 253 still exceeds it

input.prompt: Flat icon design of cloud computing

cases.source: synthetic — white minimalist design has brightness check disabled
cases.description: White minimalist design — threshold set to 255, effectively disabled

input.prompt: White minimalist geometric shapes on clean background

cases.source: synthetic — frame type with brightness 250 (under 252 threshold)
cases.description: Frame type with brightness under relaxed threshold — acceptable

input.prompt: Timeline frame with three steps in minimal style

cases.source: nanoBanana-guide — empty/corrupt file
cases.description: File under 10KB for photo type is likely corrupt or empty

input.prompt: Detailed landscape photograph

cases.source: synthetic — icon file at 6KB is above icon threshold (5KB)
cases.description: Icon type has lower min size (5120) — 6KB is acceptable

input.prompt: Simple flat icon design

cases.source: synthetic — natural subject with warm tones against cool palette is acceptable
cases.description: Photographic natural subjects have inherent color variation — IV-09 threshold should be relaxed (200 for natural)

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — edge density too low for tier
cases.description: Default type tier 2 with edge density below minimum 0.05

input.prompt: Abstract illustration of network connections

cases.source: generate-images.mjs — edge density too high for tier
cases.description: Default type tier 1 with edge density above maximum 0.25

input.prompt: Simple abstract gradient background

cases.source: synthetic — photographic type tier 1 below minimum 0.02
cases.description: Photographic content should have some edge detail — 0.01 too low

input.prompt: Cinematic aerial photograph of coastline

cases.source: synthetic — cover/background type has relaxed range
cases.description: Cover slide with low edge density is normal — covers are simple

input.prompt: Abstract gradient background

cases.source: synthetic — frame type has wider range
cases.description: Frame/diagram type allows higher edge density — vector diagrams are naturally detailed

input.prompt: Timeline frame showing quarterly milestones with flowchart connections

cases.source: synthetic — photographic type allows high edge density
cases.description: Cinematic photograph naturally has high edge density — within range

input.prompt: Cinematic aerial photograph of a dense city skyline

cases.source: synthetic — no edgeDensity means IV-10 cannot run
cases.description: Missing edgeDensity data — IV-10 should skip (not error)

input.prompt: Abstract background design
